markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, performance, and plan the QBR.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance is strong:** Sessions doubled and engaged sessions are scaling, driven by a "How to scale your MSP business" article with 6,000% growth and 46% engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [**PMM feedback is subjective:** A 6/10 score from one PMM (Oliver) and a request from another (Joe) to reframe content for "organizations" instead of "MSPs/IT teams" highlight a need for standardized feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Competitor listicle approved:** The MTR competitor listicle is approved for PMM review, with Elaine pre-aligning the security PMM by sharing a Sentinel-1 example.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**QBR planned for next week:** A 45-min QBR will review performance and align on priorities for the final 3 months of the contract. Nick will coordinate with the new VP of Demand Gen, Chris.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Topics

### PMM Feedback & Standardization

  - [PMM feedback is currently subjective and lacks a standardized framework.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Example 1 (Oliver):** A 6/10 score on an N-central article, based on personal opinion.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**Example 2 (Joe):** A request to frame content for "organizations" instead of segmenting by "MSPs" vs. "IT teams."](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Action:** Nick will poll PMMs on the need for a formal check-in to standardize feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To avoid disrupting the current, effective production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Content Performance

  - [**Production Cadence:** 4 articles published last week; 7 expected this week.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**SEO Wins:** New content is ranking quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - ["Attack resilience": P1 rank for primary keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - ["Continuous threat monitoring": Near P1 rank.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**Traffic & Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [Overall sessions from GrowthX content have doubled in the last month.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [Engaged sessions are scaling in parallel.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - ["How to scale your MSP business" article is a top driver:](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
          - [6,000% session growth.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
          - [46% engagement rate.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### Production Logistics

  - [**Image Sizing:** Standardized at **1200 x 628 px**.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [GrowthX will correct the few remaining non-compliant images.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**"Check that" Tool:** Inaccessible due to a bug; engineering is fixing it.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Competitor Listicle (MTR):**](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Elaine approved the draft structure (table + in-depth breakdown).](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Elaine pre-aligned the security PMM, who requested samples and was sent a Sentinel-1 article as an example.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [**Next Step:** GrowthX will send the draft to PMM after Andrew's final review.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

### QBR Planning

  - [**Purpose:** Review performance and align on priorities for the final 3 months of the contract, leading into a potential renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Format:** 45-minute session.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Attendees:** Nick, Andrew, and the new VP of Demand Gen, Chris.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [**Timing:** Next week is preferred. GrowthX is flexible on scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [Correct non-compliant images to the 1200 x 628 px standard.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [Send the MTR listicle draft to PMM after Andrew's review.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**Nick:**](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [Poll PMMs on the need for a formal feedback standardization meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [Coordinate QBR scheduling with Chris (VP, Demand Gen) and Andrew for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HdZPhzs1vhBAaRx69S9BHxvyiMxGgRj2?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
